title: Rollins: Highly Predictable Cash Flows, But Price Is Too High
text: Rollins has strong financials and predictable cash flows. The company's consistent revenue growth and tight profit margins make it a desirable investment. Rollins' growth strategy is focused on acquisitions, with a history of successful purchases to expand its market presence.

title: Rollins (ROL) Upgraded to Buy: Here's What You Should Know
text: Rollins (ROL) might move higher on growing optimism about its earnings prospects, which is reflected by its upgrade to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy).

title: Why Rollins Stock Was Up This Week
text: The pest control leader reported a 15% year-over-year increase in revenue in the third quarter. The pest control market is wide open, giving Rollins plenty of room to grow.

title: Rollins (ROL) Q3 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
text: The headline numbers for Rollins (ROL) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended September 2023, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.

title: Why Rollins Stock Cruised 4% Higher on Thursday
text: The storied pest fighter managed to boost both the top and bottom lines at double-digit rates in its latest quarter. It also notched twin beats on analyst estimates.

title: Rollins, Inc. (ROL) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Rollins, Inc. (NYSE:ROL ) Q3 2023 Earnings Conference Call October 26, 2023 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Ken Krause - Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer & Treasurer Lyndsey Burton - Vice President, Investor Relations Jerry Gahlhoff - President and Chief Executive Officer Conference Call Participants Ashish Sabadra - RBC Capital Markets Tim Mulrooney - William Blair Josh Chan - UBS Aadit Shrestha - Stifel Harold Antor - Jefferies John Mazzoni - Wells Fargo Ollie Davies - Redburn Operator Greetings and welcome to the Rollins, Inc. title: Rollins' (ROL) Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates, Increase Y/Y
text: Rollins' (ROL) third-quarter 2023 revenues increase year over year.

title: Rollins (ROL) Surpasses Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Rollins (ROL) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.28 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.24 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.22 per share a year ago.

title: ROLLINS, INC. REPORTS THIRD QUARTER 2023 FINANCIAL RESULTS
text: 15% growth in revenue drives an 18% improvement in GAAP EPS and 27% improvement in Adjusted EPS ATLANTA , Oct. 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Rollins, Inc. (NYSE:ROL) ("Rollins" or the "Company"), a premier global consumer and commercial services company, reported unaudited financial results for the third quarter of 2023. Key Highlights Third quarter revenues were $840 million, an increase of 15.2% over the third quarter 2022 with organic revenues* increasing 8.4%.

title: ROLLINS, INC. ANNOUNCES 15 PERCENT INCREASE IN REGULAR QUARTERLY CASH DIVIDEND
text: ATLANTA , Oct. 24, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Rollins, Inc. (NYSE:ROL), a premier global consumer and commercial services company announced that the Board of Directors declared a regular quarterly cash dividend on its common stock of $0.15 per share payable December 11, 2023 to shareholders of record at the close of business on November 10, 2023.  This represents an increase of 15 percent from the same quarter a year ago.

title: Oh, Rats! Chicago Tops Orkin's Rattiest Cities List for Ninth Consecutive Year
text: Los Angeles Reclaims Second Spot, New York Drops to Third ATLANTA , Oct. 23, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Chicago continues its first-place run in the rat race, topping Orkin's Top 50 Rattiest Cities List for the ninth year in a row. Los Angeles  moved up to the #2 ranking while New York  rounds out the top three spots.

title: 2 Magnificent Stocks to Buy That Are Near 52-Week Lows
text: Rollins keeps busy with acquisitions, adding 169 purchases and counting in the last five years. Insperity's ridiculous profitability and steady sales growth are best among its peer group.

title: Here's Why Rollins Stock Plunged to a 52-Week Low Today
text: One short-seller believes there's up to 33% more downside for Rollins stock ahead. A huge Rollins shareholder has been selling recently, which does suggest more downside in the near future.

title: ROLLINS, INC. SCHEDULES DATE FOR RELEASE OF THIRD QUARTER 2023 RESULTS
text: ATLANTA , Oct. 12, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Rollins, Inc. (NYSE: ROL) ("Rollins" or the "Company"), a premier global consumer and commercial services company, today announced that it will release its third quarter financial results for the period ended September 30, 2023, after the market closes on Wednesday, October 25, 2023. In conjunction with its release, the Company will host a conference call to review the Company's financial and operating results before the market opens on Thursday, October 26, 2023, at 8:30 a.m.

title: 4 Factor Dividend Growth Portfolio: First Year Is Coming Down To The Wire
text: The 4-factor dividend growth portfolio is a strategy that leverages the stock selection process of Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF, with a few minor twists. The portfolio fell by 6.29% in September, underperforming the S&P 500 by 1.53%. Year-to-date, the portfolio is up 6.89%. Since its inception, the portfolio has generated 1.90% of alpha over the S&P 500.

title: Rollins (ROL) Rides on Strong Operating Platform and Buyouts
text: Shareholder-friendly behavior and a healthy demand situation bode well for Rollins (ROL).
